Find Your Tiger's Guide

Take a short Big Five (OCEAN) personality assessment. We will generate your wellness profile and match you with the right DePauw counselor.

What is the Big Five?
The OCEAN model is the most scientifically validated personality framework. It measures Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism — the five core dimensions that shape how we think, feel, and connect with others.
25 questions ~4 minutes Instant match
